advisory.reason: Baseline threshold (0.3) already yielded 50 nodes. Lowering threshold is likely unnecessary noise.

pilot_evaluation.reason: Uncertain topology or borderline metrics - Manual calibration needed.

model_policy_reason: Production Policy v1: Haiku-only due to graph density ceiling

questions.question: What are the two phases of the firmware update process?
questions.justification: The synthesis text clearly outlines the two phases of the firmware update process: Phase 1 (Upload) and Phase 2 (Internal Update).

questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'Restore_Address' command?
questions.justification: The synthesis text explains that the 'Restore_Address' command is used to update the internal write pointer of the Hub FW, allowing it to continue the firmware update from the specified address after an error recovery.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'HID_CMD_Enable_Scaler_OnlineSpeedUp' command?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that the 'HID_CMD_Enable_Scaler_OnlineSpeedUp' command is used to initiate the Scaler update phase of the firmware update process.
